    $value[0]
    schoolprogram_id => string (1) "1"
    $value[0]['schoolprogram_id']
    schoolprogram_title => string (12) "PROGRAM KAMI"
    $value[0]['schoolprogram_title']
    schoolprogram_title_en => string (12) "OUR PROGRAMS"
    $value[0]['schoolprogram_title_en']
    schoolprogram_desc => string (608) "<p>Selamat datang di Oceanarium Adventure Extravaganza kami! Ajak siswa Anda...
    $value[0]['schoolprogram_desc']
    <p>Selamat datang di Oceanarium Adventure Extravaganza kami! Ajak siswa Anda ke dalam dunia penuh keajaiban saat berkunjung dan menikmati keindahan bawah laut dan rain forest yang eksotik. Goals kami Adalah untuk Menginspirasi seluruh pengunjung terutama bagi anak-anak untuk dapat peduli dan juga mencintai keunikan biota bawah laut dan juga rainforest yang eksotik.</p><p>Pada Program School Fieldtrip BXSea siswa akan dipandu oleh Dedicated Tour Guide BXSea yang berpengalaman di Oceanarium. Anak-anak akan diajak berinteraksi langsung dengan biota BXSea dan mendapatkan Xperience yang tak terlupakan.</p>
    schoolprogram_desc_en => string (553) "<p>Welcome to our Oceanarium Adventure Extravaganza! Take your students into...
    $value[0]['schoolprogram_desc_en']
    <p>Welcome to our Oceanarium Adventure Extravaganza! Take your students into a world of wonder while visiting and enjoy the exotic underwater beauty and rain forest. Our goal is to inspire all visitors, especially for children, to be able to care and also love the uniqueness of underwater biota and also exotic rainforests.</p><p>At BXSea School Fieldtrip Program, students will be guided by an experienced BXSea Dedicated Tour Guide at the Oceanarium. Children will be invited to interact directly with BXSea biota and get unforgettable Xperience.</p>
    schoolprogram_pict => string (46) "bxsea_image1713944427_1d5885a0c1d6f4a2a30f.jpg"
    $value[0]['schoolprogram_pict']
    schoolprogram_link => null
    $value[0]['schoolprogram_link']
    1 => array (7)
    $value[1]
    schoolprogram_id => string (1) "2"
    $value[1]['schoolprogram_id']
    schoolprogram_title => string (14) "MENGAPA BXSEA?"
    $value[1]['schoolprogram_title']
    schoolprogram_title_en => string (10) "WHY BXSEA?"
    $value[1]['schoolprogram_title_en']
    schoolprogram_desc => UTF-8 string (723) "<p><strong>Jelajahi Keajaiban Bawah Laut dan Exotic Rain Forest :</strong> B...
    $value[1]['schoolprogram_desc']
    <p><strong>Jelajahi Keajaiban Bawah Laut dan Exotic Rain Forest :</strong> Berkunjung di BXSea anda akan dibawa untuk melalui journey yang terbagi menjadi 18 area yang merupakan journey aquarium terpanjang di Indonesia, di mana para siswa akan bertemu langsung dengan keindahan berbagai biota laut, reptil, dan air tawar. BXSea berkomitmen untuk memberikan suguhan keanekaragaman kehidupan laut dalam suasana bawah air yang spektakuler. </p><p><strong>Souvenir yang menarik :</strong> Sebagai kenang-kenangan petualangan di lautan, setiap sekolah akan menerima pelakat yang dipersonalisasi. Ini merupakan pengingat akan pengetahuan yang diperoleh dan kenangan yang tercipta selama kunjungan mereka ke Oceanarium kami.</p>
    schoolprogram_desc_en => UTF-8 string (645) "<p><strong>Explore Underwater Wonders and Exotic Rain Forest</strong>: Visit...
    $value[1]['schoolprogram_desc_en']
    <p><strong>Explore Underwater Wonders and Exotic Rain Forest</strong>: Visit BXSea you will be taken through a journey that is divided into 18 areas which is the longest aquarium journey in Indonesia, where students will meet directly with the beauty of various marine life, reptiles, and freshwater. BXSea is committed to providing a treat of marine life diversity in a spectacular underwater setting. </p><p><strong>Interesting souvenirs</strong>: As a memento of adventures in the ocean, each school will receive a personalized placard. It is a reminder of the knowledge gained and memories created during their visit to our Oceanarium.</p>
    schoolprogram_pict => string (46) "bxsea_image1713946396_76ddb30ac30164e69395.jpg"
    $value[1]['schoolprogram_pict']
    schoolprogram_link => null
    $value[1]['schoolprogram_link']

    $value[2]['schoolprogram_title']

    schoolprogram_desc => UTF-8 string (606) "<p><strong>Tour dengan konsep edukasi : </strong>Para pemandu ahli kami hadi...
    $value[2]['schoolprogram_desc']
    <p><strong>Tour dengan konsep edukasi : </strong>Para pemandu ahli kami hadir untuk membuat proses belajar menjadi lebih menyenangkan! Setiap program akan disesuaikan untuk berbagai kelompok usia, tur edukatif kami memberikan wawasan menarik tentang biota laut, ekosistem, dan pentingnya konservasi laut. </p><p><strong>Pusat Pembelajaran Interaktif :</strong> Jelajahi lebih dalam ke dunia laut dengan stasiun pembelajaran interaktif kami. Siswa dapat menyentuh dan mempelajari tentang upaya konservasi laut, bahkan berpartisipasi dalam kegiatan yang menarik untuk meningkatkan kesadaran lingkungan.</p>
    schoolprogram_desc_en => UTF-8 string (577) "<p><strong>Tour with educational concept</strong>: Our expert guides are her...
    $value[2]['schoolprogram_desc_en']
    <p><strong>Tour with educational concept</strong>: Our expert guides are here to make the learning process even more fun! Each program will be tailored for different age groups, our educational tours provide fascinating insights into marine life, ecosystems, and the importance of marine conservation. </p><p><strong>Interactive Learning Center</strong>: Explore deeper into the ocean world with our interactive learning stations. Students can touch and learn about marine conservation efforts, even participate in interesting activities to raise environmental awareness.</p>
    schoolprogram_pict => string (46) "bxsea_image1713946904_7ec10579853e0cf9b4d4.jpg"
    $value[2]['schoolprogram_pict']
    schoolprogram_link => null
    $value[2]['schoolprogram_link']
